_comment: Per-planet star overrides for the war-map nodes. Key = planet index (e.g. "42") OR the planet's UPPER-CASE name (e.g. "SIEMNOT"). Any field may be omitted. Fields: type = single|binary|trinary ; color = #hex ; scale = ~0.5-2 ; brightness = ~0.5-1.5. Unconfigured planets get a deterministic varied default. The two underscore keys below are ignored examples — copy the shape, then add real entries.
